'''gasada''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:pycnopodioside|pycnopodioside]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-s-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pycnopodioside|pycnopodioside]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| gasada
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || gæsædæth || gæsædæj || gæsædæsh || gæsædæ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || gasasadath || gasasadaj || gasasadash || gasasada
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || gasadath || gasadaj || gasadash || gasada
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || gasafdafth || gasafdafj || gasafdafsh || gasafdaf
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || gasadatha || gasadaja || gasadasha || gasadaka
|-
| [[Patient]] || gasadath || gasadaj || gasadash || gasada
|-
| [[Possessive]] || gasadathal || gasadajal || gasadashal || gasadakal
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || gasadaathatha || gasadaajaja || gasadaashasha || gasadaaka
|-
| [[Dative]] || gasadathan || gasadajan || gasadashan || gasadakan
|-
| [[Speaker]] || gasadathaoro || gasadajaoro || gasadashaoro || gasadakaoro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
